slice_name: Create and manage client projects with currency and billable rate
layer: design-layer oracle (bugfix) — ONE reproduction test (red→green) + mandatory scoped regression layer (BF4) + frozen touched contract tests inherited by reference. SPECS not code. No new contract/flow/AC, no build DAG.

reproduction_test.asserts: GET /projects with null-rate project owned by authenticated freelancer → HTTP 200, project row present with rate column rendered as '—', no crash, no 500
reproduction_test.flips_green_when: Null billable_rate renders as blank placeholder em-dash ('—') in rate column; the row renders, no numeric format applied to null value

class_ext_specs.basis: REGRESSION_GUARD AC6 guards rated-project rendering + project CRUD; scope limited to BLAST_RADIUS symbol _ProjectManagementAdapter._render, NOT full inherited suite (Risk R4)
